meta.title: Tako — Trade On-Chain. Win With The Collective.
meta.description: The easiest way to trade on-chain, with community at the center. Tako gives you a self-custodial perp DEX, multilingual VIP signals, and structured education — all in one place.
meta.ogDescription: Self-custodial perp DEX, multilingual signals, education, community.

hero.lead: The easiest way to trade on-chain — with community at the center. A self-custodial perpetuals DEX, multilingual VIP signals, and structured education from operators who actually trade.

pillars.lead: Trade, learn, signal, and discuss — under one roof. Each part of Tako reinforces the others. The DEX is where you act. The signals are how you find edge. Education sharpens it. Community compounds it.

dex.title:
TRADE PERPS ON TAKO DEX.
SELF-CUSTODIAL. DEEP LIQUIDITY.
dex.body: Up to 100× leverage on 70+ markets, sub-second execution, aggregated liquidity across 17+ chains. Powered by Orderly Network infrastructure. You stay in custody — Tako never holds your assets. Just trade.

signals.title: LIVE VIP SIGNALS IN YOUR LANGUAGE.
signals.body: Entries, targets, stops, and reasoning — posted live by operators who trade their own calls. Available in 4 languages today, expanding to 8.

edu.title: LEARN FROM PEOPLE WHO TRADE.
edu.body: Structured modules from market basics to position sizing, perp mechanics, on-chain analytics, and risk management. Built around real trades — no theory-only nonsense.

journal.title:
THE TAKO JOURNAL.
MARKET NOTES, POST-MORTEMS, DEEP DIVES.
journal.body: Weekly market-structure breakdowns, perp funding analysis, narrative tracking, on-chain research, and trade post-mortems — the wins and the L's. Published in multiple languages.

community.title: A MULTILINGUAL TRADING FLOOR THAT NEVER SLEEPS.
community.lead: Operators across global time zones. Signals dropped the moment setups form. Real-time market chat, trade reviews, exclusive macro calls — pick your language, jump in.

journalTeaser.lead: Weekly notes on market structure, funding rates, perp flow, and what's actually happening on-chain.

a1.title: Why Funding Rates Lie — And What To Watch Instead
a1.excerpt: Open interest and funding rates have become the consensus dashboard. But in this late-cycle environment, they're noisier than ever. Here's the framework we actually use to size positions.

a2.title: Perpetuals 101: Leverage Isn't Your Problem — Sizing Is
a2.excerpt: Beginner-friendly breakdown of perp mechanics, and why your sizing math matters more than your entry.

a3.title: SOL Long: +18% In 14 Hours. What The Chart Told Us
a3.excerpt: Walkthrough of a closed VIP call. Entry trigger, scaling plan, where we were almost wrong.

ctaStripe.lead: Launch the DEX. Join the signals. Read the journal. Sharpen your edge — in your language.

footer.tagline: The easiest way to trade on-chain — with community at the center. Perp DEX, multilingual signals, education, community.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Tako. Trade responsibly. Not financial advice.
